nasb.text: When He set for the sea its boundary So that the water would not transgress His command, When He marked out the foundations of the earth;

esv.text: when he assigned to the sea its limit, so that the waters might not transgress his command, when he marked out the foundations of the earth,

cnv.text: 他為海洋定出界限， 海水不能越過他的命令， 他又劃定大地的根基；

ccb.text: 设定沧海的界限， 使海水不得越过祂定的范围， 为大地奠定根基的时候，

csbs.text: 他为海洋设立界限， 使众水不能违背他的吩咐； 他立定了大地的根基——
